# Go/No-Go Evidence Template

## Release Candidate
- Feature:
- Build/PR:
- Date:
- Decision Owner:

## Evidence Packet
- Eval summary:
- Risk register status:
- Open incidents:
- Rollout readiness checks:
- On-call and escalation confirmation:

## Red-Line Triggers
- [ ] Critical risk unresolved
- [ ] Regression trend without mitigation
- [ ] Missing escalation owner
- [ ] Incomplete evidence packet

## Decision
- Decision: `GO` / `NO-GO`
- Rationale:
- Follow-up Actions:
